half-moon-putney.label: Low-cost music option
half-moon-putney.title: New Moon nights can be a cheaper way in
half-moon-putney.detail: Some New Moon listings at The Half Moon are priced from £2.50. It is an event series, not a regular happy hour: the date, time and ticket price can change.

the-lamb-bloomsbury.label: Happy-hour check
the-lamb-bloomsbury.title: No regular happy hour confirmed
the-lamb-bloomsbury.detail: The Lamb’s official pages publish menus and opening hours, but no recurring happy-hour pricing was confirmed when this route was checked.
the-lamb-bloomsbury.sourceLabel: Check current menus and opening hours

southampton-arms-hampstead.label: Happy-hour check
southampton-arms-hampstead.title: No regular happy hour confirmed
southampton-arms-hampstead.detail: No recurring happy-hour offer was confirmed on the venue’s official information when this route was checked. The finish still works best as a walk-in, not a reservation-led plan.

queens-head-kings-cross.label: Happy-hour check
queens-head-kings-cross.title: No regular happy hour confirmed
queens-head-kings-cross.detail: No recurring happy-hour pricing was confirmed on the venue’s official page when this route was drafted. Check the current menu and opening hours before making it the finish.
